name: home-security-agent
description: A specialist agent that assesses smart-home security posture and guides incident response.

skills.name: Risk assessment
skills.description: Evaluate the user's stated smart-home setup and identify the biggest security gaps ranked by severity.
examples: Review the security of my Wi-Fi cameras and door locks.

skills.name: Incident response
skills.description: Given a smart-home alert or observation, recommend immediate actions and follow-up steps.
examples: Motion detected at 2am, what to do?
My smart lock shows a failed unlock attempt — steps?
